findings.location: s1 — 条件を必要としないSQL文の場合の実装例 (Java code comment)
findings.description: The source includes a clarifying comment in the no-condition code example: '// SQL_IDは便宜上使い回しているが、本来は可変の条件がないSQL文を指定する。' This is a recommendation that, in the no-condition case, the caller should specify an SQL statement that genuinely has no variable conditions (rather than reusing the GET_DELETE_USER_LIST SQL as is done in the example). The knowledge file omits this guidance, leaving the code example without the important caveat about correct usage.
findings.source_evidence: // SQL_IDは便宜上使い回しているが、本来は可変の条件がないSQL文を指定する。

findings.description: The PascalCase class `SystemAccountEntity` appears in the Java code example in s1 (used as the condition object) but is not listed in the hints array.
